channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter picker required, 13th May
item.description:
Not sure what's happen here in 1 week but litter all along hutchibs road and more so on path leading into butt's Wood, again. It's full of surgical gloves? Now if these have been used, it's causes disease to those who may touch !!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hutchins Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped construction waste, 13th May
item.description:
Dumped construction waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public litter bins overflowing, 13th May
item.description:
Public black litter bins all around Blackheath Standard are overflowing. This one and especially the ones near the hardware shop at the top of Westcombe Hill. This is an ongoing problem and a blight on the area. Big bags of litter are placed in or around them and then ripped apart by foxes. There is litter all over the roads. Please consider removing the bins; emptying them more frequently; dissuading people from placing bags of litter in them; or other solutions.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near School sofas and mattress on floor, 13th May
item.description:
On this corner there is several sofas, and mattress on footpath. Not possible for children to ride/walk to school safely. Also bin bags broken on Jeken road. It is constantly a problem on the corner with fly tipping. Need cameras.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Green Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Swift cars, 13th May
item.description:
Fridge fly tipped yeaterday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Over grown shrubs & litter, 13th May
item.description:
LITTER THROWN IN BUSHES ENCOURAGING FOXES & VERMIN ie. RATS. SHRUBS WITH DIFFERING DEGREES OF THORNS VERY OVER GROWN,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adams Road, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping against recycling bin in Wentworth Crescent, 13th May
item.description:
The rubbish includes a toilet cistern and an electric fan. It prevents the recycling being collected.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wentworth Crescent, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matress dumped on pavement., 13th May
item.description:
Matress dumped on pavement ,been here 3 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northwood Place, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Litter and broken glass, 13th May
item.description:
Been there for several weeks. It’s a post office, there are a lot of people

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wimbourne Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Unremoved stump outside 22 Crewdson Rd, 13th May
item.description:
Has not been removed in years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Crewdson Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown ivory and other vegetation, 13th May
item.description:
Outside door of number 20 Gresswell close and 19 gresswell close the walkway to our gardens has overgrown growth from the neighbours garden on hatherly road. we are not sure who's garden it is but it is not being looked after and the ivory and growth is taking over the fence, causing it to tilt and sway in the wind. Also to the point where we had to cut the ivory on the pathway ourselves before this photo as it was blocking the walkway head height and is only going to grow more.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gresswell Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped, 13th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunlop Place, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 13th May
item.description:
Rubbish everywhere that requires cleaning up - fix proof bins required to prevent this happening every day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Green, Longlands, Greater London

item.title: Road sign abandoned in path after road closure, 13th May
item.description:
This sign has been left since last year. It is blocking the path, falls in the road, gets moved. Can someone sell it for scrap. It is left over from the water works on Leyland last year

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carston Close, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Been there for days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Huntsman Street, Walworth, Greater London
